signals.reasoning: BTC is already in a liquidation-flush state, so I would not chase a fresh short after the initial dump.
ETH is also already flushing and does not offer a clean new edge in either direction right here.
SOL remains a reduced-size short lean because price is still down while the tape still shows fresh shorts pressing rather than a clean reversal.
ETHFI is already weak and too low-liquidity to trust for a serious fresh short chase.
LIT remains one of the cleaner shorts because the tape is weak and fresh shorts are still pressing while open interest continues to build.
GRIFFAIN is already weak and too illiquid to trust for a serious fresh short entry after the move.
WLFI is still the only real long candidate because funding is deeply negative while price and open interest are both rising together, but veto keeps it reduced-confidence only.
RESOLV has upside momentum, but liquidity is too poor and veto blocks forcing a fresh long.
DASH is already in a hard liquidation-flush state and I would rather wait than chase a fresh short here.
ZEN is already weak and too low-liquidity to trust for a serious fresh short chase after the move.
MON is already down hard on the day, so I would rather wait than force a late short here even though the bias is still bearish.
